title: Acinodendron obscurum

taxonomy: Acinodendron obscurum is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae. It belongs to the order Myrtales and is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. As a member of the Melastomataceae family, Acinodendron obscurum is often referred to as a melastome. This family is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the "torch flowers" or "memorial flowers." Acinodendron obscurum shares similarities with other species within the Melastomataceae family.
